sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَ سَمِيرٌ إِلَى مُقَابَلَةِ عَمَلٍ جَدِيدَةٍ صَبَاحَ الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je jutros otišao na razgovor za novi posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir went to a new job interview this morning.

sentences.arabic: لَبِسَ بَدْلَةً رَسْمِيَّةً وَأَحْضَرَ سِيرَتَهُ الذَّاتِيَّةَ مَعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Obukao je formalno odijelo i donio svoju biografiju sa sobom.
sentences.translationEn: He wore a formal suit and brought his CV with him.

sentences.arabic: أَجَابَ عَنِ الْأَسْئِلَةِ بِثِقَةٍ وَهُدُوءٍ أَمَامَ الْمُدِيرِ.
sentences.translation: Odgovarao je na pitanja s povjerenjem i smirenošću pred direktorom.
sentences.translationEn: He answered the questions with confidence and calmness before the manager.

sentences.arabic: يَتَمَنَّى سَمِيرٌ أَنْ يَحْصُلَ عَلَى هَذِهِ الْوَظِيفَةِ الْمُمْتَازَةِ.
sentences.translation: Samir se nada da će dobiti ovaj odličan posao.
sentences.translationEn: Samir hopes to get this excellent job.
